title: delicate light syrian broccoli pilaf
description: a fresh, flaky, light syrian dish featuring broccoli and pickle, perfect for diabetic diets
instructions: in a large pan, heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil over medium heat.
add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
add the minced garlic and sauté for another minute.
add the broccoli florets and sauté for 3-4 minutes, until tender.
add the pickle slices, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
add the flour and stir to coat the vegetables.
add the chicken breast and stir to coat with the flour mixture.
cook the chicken for 5-6 minutes on each side, until cooked through.
remove the chicken from the pan and let it rest.
add the lemon juice and stir to combine.
return the chicken to the pan and stir to coat with the sauce.
serve the chicken and vegetables hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
note: adjust the amount of lemon juice to taste.
